jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer -- CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is
building a company that thinks the same way -- AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization: Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication
02 Store Clienteling: Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day
03 Business Intelligence: Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams: Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster
05 Open Mandate: Demand forecasting, AI stylist, gifting concierge, supplier communication

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Comfortable connecting systems that weren't designed to talk to each other: APIs, webhooks, data pipelines.
Familiarity with Shopify's API ecosystem, or e-commerce data generally.
Experience with MoEngage or any CRM / marketing automation platform.
Exposure to ERP - Microsoft Dynamics 365.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand.
master_cv:
# Siddharth Saminathan
**AI Product Engineer · Systems Architect**
+91 7299707403 · siddharthsaminathan99@gmail.com · Chennai, India
Website: https://emotenow.app/ · github.com/siddharthsaminathan

---

## Profile

AI Product and Systems Engineer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping production AI systems across data infrastructure, enterprise workflows, and consumer applications. Focus on taking systems from concept to real users, improving them through measurable outcomes such as latency, cost, and user retention. Experience spans multi-agent orchestration, real-time pipelines, and memory-driven AI systems, with a strong emphasis on reliability and iteration in production environments.

---

## Work Experience

### AI Engineer — Omnex Systems (AquaPro AI)
**2025 – Present | Chennai, India**

- Built a production AI system enabling AI-assisted quality and control workflows (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, Process Flows, 5W2H, 5 Whys, 8D), improving consistency and reducing manual analysis effort for engineering teams.
- Designed an orchestration layer using tool-calling: selects tools, routes data across internal services, and executes multi-step workflows end-to-end (generate, validate, update).
- Enabled the system to understand production hierarchies and categories, map inputs to the right structures, and suggest updates based on existing data.
- Implemented feedback-aware flows: retrieves similar past concerns, links them, updates records, and suggests impactful actions to users.
- Reduced response latency from ~12.5s to ~8s by restructuring the pipeline and consolidating model calls.
- Improved output consistency and reduced failures with validation layers, retry handling, and fallback logic.
- Implemented observability (structured logging, tracing, and metrics) to monitor system behavior and debug production issues.

### Co-Founder, AI Product Engineer — Emote (emotenow.app)
**2024 – Present**

- Built a production AI companion system for hyper-personalized emotional support — users feel remembered and do not start over each session.
- Designed a memory system that tracks emotional context, relationships, and cause-effect patterns across 100s of conversations, improving relevance per user.
- Built the backend from scratch (FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, hosted on Fly.io) with SSE streaming and WebSocket-based real-time pipelines, caching, and multi-model routing.
- Scaled from 0 to 450+ users, with 40+ power users and ~13–15% weekly cohort retention (pre-PMF).
- Reduced inference cost per conversation from ~$1.20 to ~$0.023 through model selection, caching, and prompt optimization.
- Improved latency from ~15s to ~3s through pipeline optimization and streaming.
- Built an internal AI product manager that monitors system behaviour, detects anomalies, and improves observability across the production AI stack.
- Built a Reddit bot to automate user acquisition; reduced outreach time from ~6–8 hours to ~30–40 minutes, enabling 50–100 hyper-personalized DMs per session, increasing activation from ~20% to ~75% and weekly retention from ~5% to ~13%.

### Data Engineer — Akkodis AB (Ericsson Client)
**Nov 2022 – Nov 2024 | Sweden**

- Led migration of enterprise data platform from Azure to on-prem PostgreSQL cloud environment.
- Owned redesign of data pipelines powering reporting systems across data owners and stakeholders.
- Built and designed end-to-end ETL lifecycle for dashboards (Power BI, Tableau) used by business stakeholders.
- Ensured data reliability and consistency during large-scale migration through data quality audits.

### Data Analyst — Positive Integers Pvt Ltd
**Sep 2019 – May 2020 | Chennai, India**

- Built Tableau dashboards for an NBFC to analyze credit risk and loan repayment behaviour.
- Built real-time Grafana dashboards for ID by SPI Cinemas to track full order-to-table lifecycle.
- Built SQL-based ETL workflows to extract, transform, and load data from operational source systems into reporting layers.

---

## Skills

**Programming & Data:** Python, SQL

**Backend & Systems:** FastAPI, Redis (caching, queues), PostgreSQL, REST APIs, async pipelines, WebSockets, SSE streaming

**AI / ML Systems:** LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, embeddings, prompt design, multi-model routing, multi-agent orchestration, memory systems

**Infra & Deployment:** Docker, Fly.io, AWS (basics), logging, observability, performance optimization

**Data & Analytics:** ETL pipelines, Power BI, Tableau, data validation, pipeline optimization

---

## Education

**M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning** — Linköping University, Sweden · 2020–2022
- Thesis: ML pipeline for colorectal cancer metastasis prediction from high-dimensional RNA sequencing data (~64,000 features, under 50 samples).
- Applied autoencoders for feature compression and representation learning.
- Used PCA for dimensionality reduction and feature selection.
- Performed gene set enrichment analysis and statistical modelling to identify biologically relevant patterns.

**B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering** — SRM University, India · 2016–2020

---

## Achievements

- Built Emote from zero: grew to 450+ users with 40+ power users, 13–15% weekly retention with zero paid acquisition. (https://emotenow.app/)
- Led enterprise data platform migration (Azure to PostgreSQL) at Akkodis for Ericsson; recognised for improving reporting reliability and delivery.

---

## Languages

English (Fluent) · Tamil (Native) · Hindi

narrative.headline: Manufacturing Enterprise Quality Digitalization — agentic AI for mission-critical production systems
narrative.exit_story: Built Emote from zero to 450+ users (15x latency reduction, 50x cost reduction). Now building agentic AI for enterprise quality management at Omnex Systems — automating DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, and 8D across global manufacturing supply chains.
superpowers: Manufacturing enterprise quality digitalization (EQMS, APQP, DFMEA/PFMEA)
Agentic AI orchestration — multi-step quality workflows with full traceability
Taking AI from concept to production (0→1→iteration)
Full-stack AI: architecture, backend, observability, iteration

proof_points.name: Omnex Agentic AI
proof_points.hero_metric: Production multi-agent system for quality workflows, 12.5s→8s

proof_points.name: Akkodis Data Migration
proof_points.hero_metric: Azure→PostgreSQL migration for Ericsson, 5% reporting accuracy improvement

compensation.location_flexibility: Remote preferred. Chennai or Bangalore hybrid possible.

location.onsite_availability: Remote-first. Can do Chennai or Bangalore hybrid.

s7_rewrite_context.max_5_bullet_guidance: Lead every bullet with a strong action verb and a measurable outcome. Replace weak verbs (Analyzed, Supported, Assisted) with ownership verbs (Built, Owned, Shipped, Drove). Keep all metrics exact.
s7_rewrite_context.founder_context: Co-founded by Simran Lal and her husband Raul Rai. Simran Lal is inspired by travel, India, and nature; Raul Rai previously Managing Director at Eight Roads Ventures.
interview_prep_hints: Describe a real project where you used an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) to solve a business problem.
How would you design a personalization engine for an e-commerce brand using Shopify APIs?
Walk us through how you would replace a BI dashboard with a conversational AI layer.

Walk us through how you would replace a BI dashboard with a conversational AI layer.

positioning_strategy.one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer with strong backend and data infrastructure, building user-facing AI from concept to production
positioning_strategy.narrative_angle: Backend-heavy AI engineer seeking transition to product-focused role, with proven ability to ship end-to-end AI features
lead_strengths: Python and LLM API production experience
End-to-end system architecture and user growth

Reduced inference cost per conversation by 98%
Led enterprise data platform migration improving reporting reliability
things_to_downplay: No retail or e-commerce domain knowledge

positioning_strategy.reasoning: Role requires frontend development skills which candidate lacks entirely. Additionally, missing retail/e-commerce experience and design alignment with the brand. Strong AI backend skills are not sufficient to overcome these gaps. Recommend building frontend skills and domain knowledge before applying.

application_pack.resume_markdown:
## Siddharth Saminathan

**AI Product Engineer · Systems Architect**
+91 7299707403 · siddharthsaminathan99@gmail.com · Chennai, India
Website: https://emotenow.app/ · github.com/siddharthsaminathan

---

## Profile

Backend-focused AI engineer with 4+ years shipping production AI systems end-to-end, from data pipelines to user-facing features. Proven ability to own product outcomes: built an AI companion from concept to 450+ users with 13-15% weekly retention, reduced inference cost per conversation from $1.20 to $0.023, and cut response latency from 12.5s to 8s. Experienced with LLM APIs, multi-agent orchestration, and real-time personalization—ready to apply this to e-commerce clienteling and conversational BI.

## Work Experience

## AI Engineer — Omnex Systems (AquaPro AI)

**2025 – Present | Chennai, India**

- Shipped a production AI system that powers AI-assisted quality and control workflows (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, Process Flows, 5W2H, 5 Whys, 8D), improving consistency and reducing manual analysis effort for engineering teams — demonstrating ability to build AI-native features for domain-specific business intelligence.
- Designed an orchestration layer using tool-calling: selects tools, routes data across internal services, and executes multi-step workflows end-to-end (generate, validate, update) — a pattern directly applicable to building conversational BI layers that replace dashboards.
- Enabled the system to understand production hierarchies and categories, map inputs to the right structures, and suggest updates based on existing data — analogous to personalization intelligence that maps customer data to relevant actions.
- Implemented feedback-aware flows: retrieves similar past concerns, links them, updates records, and suggests impactful actions to users — a core capability for clienteling tools that empower store teams with actionable insights.
- Reduced response latency from ~12.5s to ~8s by restructuring the pipeline and consolidating model calls, ensuring real-time responsiveness for user-facing AI features.
- Improved output consistency and reduced failures with validation layers, retry handling, and fallback logic — critical for reliable LLM API integration in production.
- Implemented observability (structured logging, tracing, and metrics) to monitor system behavior and debug production issues, ensuring operational excellence for AI-native products.

## Co-Founder, AI Product Engineer — Emote (emotenow.app)

**2024 – Present**

- Built a production AI companion system for hyper-personalized emotional support — users feel remembered and do not start over each session.
- Designed a memory system that tracks emotional context, relationships, and cause-effect patterns across 100s of conversations, improving relevance per user.
- Built the backend from scratch (FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, hosted on Fly.io) with SSE streaming and WebSocket-based real-time pipelines, caching, and multi-model routing.
- Scaled from 0 to 450+ users, with 40+ power users and ~13–15% weekly cohort retention (pre-PMF).
- Reduced inference cost per conversation from ~$1.20 to ~$0.023 through model selection, caching, and prompt optimization.
- Improved latency from ~15s to ~3s through pipeline optimization and streaming.
- Built an internal AI product manager that monitors system behaviour, detects anomalies, and improves observability across the production AI stack.
- Built a Reddit bot to automate user acquisition; reduced outreach time from ~6–8 hours to ~30–40 minutes, enabling 50–100 hyper-personalized DMs per session, increasing activation from ~20% to ~75% and weekly retention from ~5% to ~13%.

## Data Engineer — Akkodis AB (Ericsson Client)

**Nov 2022 – Nov 2024 | Sweden**

- Owned the end-to-end migration of an enterprise data platform from Azure to on-prem PostgreSQL, ensuring data reliability and consistency through rigorous quality audits — directly enabling business intelligence for cross-functional stakeholders.
- Architected and shipped the full ETL lifecycle for Power BI and Tableau dashboards, replacing manual reporting with automated, data-driven insights used by business owners.
- Redesigned data pipelines powering reporting systems, collaborating with data owners and stakeholders to align data architecture with evolving business needs.
- Drove data quality initiatives during large-scale migration, establishing consistency checks that improved reporting reliability across the organization.

## Data Analyst — Positive Integers Pvt Ltd

**Sep 2019 – May 2020 | Chennai, India**

- Built SQL-based ETL workflows to extract, transform, and load data from operational source systems into reporting layers, enabling downstream business intelligence.
- Built Tableau dashboards for an NBFC to analyze credit risk and loan repayment behaviour, delivering actionable insights for decision-makers.
- Built real-time Grafana dashboards for ID by SPI Cinemas to track full order-to-table lifecycle, supporting operational efficiency.

---

## Skills

**AI & Personalization:** LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), RAG pipelines, embeddings, prompt design, multi-model routing, multi-agent orchestration, memory systems, personalization engines

**Backend & Systems:** FastAPI, Redis (caching, queues), PostgreSQL, REST APIs, async pipelines, WebSockets, SSE streaming

**Data & Business Intelligence:** SQL, Python, ETL pipelines, Power BI, Tableau, data validation, pipeline optimization

**Infra & Deployment:** Docker, Fly.io, AWS (basics), logging, observability, performance optimization

## Education

**M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning** — Linköping University, Sweden · 2020–2022

- Shipped an end-to-end ML pipeline for colorectal cancer metastasis prediction from high-dimensional RNA sequencing data (~64,000 features, under 50 samples), demonstrating ability to deliver AI features from raw data to actionable insights.
- Deployed autoencoders for feature compression and representation learning, directly applicable to building personalization engines that extract latent user preferences.
- Applied PCA for dimensionality reduction and feature selection, mirroring techniques used in clienteling intelligence layers to identify high-value customer segments.
- Performed gene set enrichment analysis and statistical modelling to identify biologically relevant patterns, showcasing business-outcome thinking and ability to communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders.

**B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering** — SRM University, India · 2016–2020

## Achievements

- Shipped Emote, an AI-native personalization engine, from zero to 450+ users with 40+ power users and 13–15% weekly retention, all through organic growth. (https://emotenow.app/)
- Led enterprise data platform migration (Azure to PostgreSQL) at Akkodis for Ericsson, driving improved reporting reliability and delivery outcomes.

---

## Languages

English (Fluent) · Tamil (Native) · Hindi
